name: gads_run_report
description: Run a Google Ads report via GAQL: given a customer, date range, metrics and segments, return the rows. Read-only — observes performance data, never mutates campaigns.

customer_ref.description: per-client customer handle resolved from clients/<client>/binding — never a raw credential or developer token

start_date.description: YYYY-MM-DD or a GAQL literal like LAST_30_DAYS
